function.rulebook_notes: Resolved informal reference via canonical cast record, extracted alias, then searched project metadata by structured identifier and read all matches.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/lukas.md` defines the gaming friend as Lukas with alias `lukas` and relationship `gaming_friend`. Both project records `40_projects/2026_05_02_black_library_evenings/README.MD` and `40_projects/2026_05_03_reading_spine/README.MD` list `entity.lukas` in linked_entities, so these are the involved projects.
